overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character exploring a historic stone corridor at night. The character walks along a torch-lit covered walkway, pauses to admire a distant view of a mansion in the valley, then continues toward a large wooden door. The scene features detailed stone architecture and warm lighting from wall-mounted torches.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic stone corridor with arched openings overlooking valley

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone corridor toward the balustrade overlooking the valley

entered.detail: series of stone arches forming the corridor structure with heavy pillars
lit torch mounted on the stone wall casting warm orange light
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars overlooking the drop
stone wall covered in dark green ivy and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered stone corridor illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The space features historic stone architecture with arches ahead and a stone balustrade on the left side overlooking a drop.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlook with panoramic view of distant estate

events.description: character stops walking and stands at the balustrade to observe the view
camera pans to reveal large illuminated mansion visible through the arches in the valley below

agents.ego_description: standing still at the stone balustrade, looking out at the distant illuminated mansion nestled in the dark valley

entered.detail: large illuminated historic building with multiple windows glowing in the distance
dark forested valley landscape visible through the arched openings

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the balustrade to observe the scenic view. Through the stone arches, a large illuminated mansion is visible in the valley below against the dark night landscape. The camera pans slightly to take in the vista while the character remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approach to large wooden entrance door

events.description: character turns away from the view and resumes walking toward the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: walking along the corridor toward the large wooden door at the end of the walkway

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal studs and arched stone frame at the corridor end
ornate wall-mounted lantern illuminating the door area with warm light
thick stone support column along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the overlook and walks toward a large wooden door at the end of the corridor. The stone balustrade is now on the right side as the character approaches the heavy wooden entrance, passing stone pillars and ornate wall sconces that illuminate the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a torch-lit stone corridor that transitions from a scenic overlook to a closed architectural entrance. It begins with the character walking along a covered walkway, passing under historic arches with a stone balustrade on the left. As the character pauses at the railing, the camera pans slightly to reveal a wide vista of a large, illuminated mansion nestled in the dark valley below. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the view and continues forward, with the balustrade now on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character past ornate wall sconces and stone pillars toward a heavy wooden door at the end of the corridor.
